{{Quote|It ain't a meg-deal. Just a pop or two a week, toppers. It's not like I'm using. It just spikens up your day, right?|Pori Nate|<ref name="Scourge" />}}
"'''Pori Nate'''" was the alias given to a fifteen-year-old drug abuser for an interview in an article written by [[Anjet Okeco]] for [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]]. "Nate" lived in the [[Jrade District/Legends|Jrade District]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and illegally visited alien bars and clubs, where he purchased [[Death stick/Legends|death sticks]]. He had posters of [[D.T. Spool and the Skroaches]] on the walls of his room and often let homework sit until the last minute.
